metadata.journal_name: University of St. Thomas Law Journal
metadata.notes: Curated current-issue seed. Listing page has article rows linking to researchonline.stthomas.edu Esploro output records; StThomasLawJournalAdapter resolves Esploro JSON metadata and PDF file IDs. Pagination strategy: none for current issue; past issue navigation is available from the journal page but Esploro search result pages are Angular-rendered.

navigation.notes: No pagination on current issue listing. Past issue page links to Esploro collection/search pages, which need API-aware expansion before broad backfile crawling.

selectors.selector: th[data-label="Article Title"] a, td[data-label="Article Title"] a, a[href*="researchonline.stthomas.edu/esploro/outputs/"]
